text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's almost White Day, and I need to think of a
present for Eishin Flash.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've spent days browsing shops online, but
nothing's jumped out at me. Perhaps it's best to
go shopping in person for this sort of thing...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, you have been muttering to yourself for
quite some time.
choice_data_list: Wha?! How long have you been here?!
Wha?! How long have you been here?!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I have been here the entire time. I made several
attempts to get your attention, but to no avail...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: What is troubling you so?
choice_data_list: Nothing is troubling me! E-everything's fine!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Nein, that is not how it appears. To be blunt, your
denial only raises my suspicion further.
choice_data_list: I'm fine, really! Uh, see you later!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Wait—Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I can ask Eishin Flash what I should
get for her for White Day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel bad for running away without explanation,
but I make my escape before she can stop me.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Flash's trainer identified at twelve o'clock.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hello there! Are you out shopping today? It's such
a nice day out, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: The Two
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain the situation and ask them for advice on
what to give Eishin Flash.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You should check out the local general store,
then! They've got lots and lots of cute things!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
That shop is apparently very popular with
students. City previously stated that it stocks
cosmetics along with general sundries.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I hope you find something nice! Oh! I think a card
would make her happy too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I thank them for their advice and make my way to
the shop. It just so happens that Tosen Jordan is
also there.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: You're looking for a thank-you gift for what you got during Valentine's? And you came here for it? Huh.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I mean, people are picky about this kinda stuff,
and getting her something she doesn't want would
suck for both of you.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Knowing Flash though, she'd be all like, "It's the
thought that counts." Anyway, she got you a
cake, so why don't you get her one too?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take a look around the shop anyway, but Tosen
Jordan's words haunt me. That's when...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
What's this I hear? So you're looking for a
thank-you gift?! How kind of you to show your
gratitude! Truly model behavior!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Just to let you know, I gave chocolates to my
whole class, BUT! I'm not expecting anything in
return! I'm a model student, after all!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
All I need is a word of thanks! WOW! Aren't I
awesome? An exemplary student, if I say so
myself! But if they wanna give me something, I'll
happily take it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I can't make up my mind. Sakura Bakushin O
does have a point. But just saying "thanks" to
Eishin Flash doesn't feel like enough...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After much deliberation, I finally decide to...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to write her a letter, not only to thank
her for her Valentine's Day gift but also to let her
know how moved I am by her hard work.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I lose count of how many times I restart the letter.
The sun has set by the time I manage to finish it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still, it doesn't feel like it would be enough to
only give her a letter. Maybe I could give her
something else too, like...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Except all the flower shops already closed two
hours ago. You'll have to buy some at a later
time.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. That is the second time I have startled you
today.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
You were mumbling out loud again. All this time,
you were stressing out about what to get me?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Is that letter... for me?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I was aware of the cultural practice of White Day,
but I did not think I would receive anything for
it...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Judging by the state of your desk, you must have
gone through many drafts and rewrites...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
If you had simply started by lightly writing a
rough draft, you wouldn't have had to use so
many sheets of—

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...No, never mind. That is not what I wish to say.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Thank you... I shall read and treasure every word.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I didn't want to give her the letter this way, but
when I hand it to her, Eishin Flash holds it like it's
the most important thing in the world.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My baking doesn't hold a candle Eishin Flash's,
but maybe I can manage cupcakes...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having decided what to do, I look up a recipe
and head out to buy ingredients.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After looking around for a while, I'm met with a
conundrum.
choice_data_list: Which of these is best for a cake?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It turns out there are multiple types of whipping
cream, and I have no clue which to buy. Should I
get an expensive one just to be safe?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
What do you intend to bake? If you want to make
something with a stronger flavor, I recommend
the one on the shelf to your right.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Goodness...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
If you are baking something, I would be more
than willing to assist. Why did you not ask me for
help?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Unless... Is there a reason why you couldn't ask
me?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
You wanted to bake me a thank-you gift for
Valentine's Day? Oh... I'd forgotten about the
cultural practice of White Day in Japan.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
However, it is already evening. Even if you start
now...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has a point. I'm not used to baking, so who
knows when I'll be able to finish. I might not even
make it in time for White Day.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Please do not be sad. It's the thought that counts.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Hm, let's see... Why don't we bake together when
there is time? I can teach you what to do.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That way, I can experience the joy of teaching,
baking, and eating the finished product with you.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That joy would be the same, whether or not we do
it on White Day. Right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Eishin Flash consoles me and chuckles to herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we celebrate White Day a few days later
by baking a cake and eating it together.
